name: ASUS PRIME B760-PLUS D4 ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - Supports DDR4-5066(OC) - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 3x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen2x2 Type-C - DisplayPort 1.4 - VGA - HDMI 2.1 - Realtek 2.5Gb LAN - Thunderbolt (USB4) Header
shortName: ASUS PRIME B760-PLUS D4 ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - Supports
description: ATX motherboard for LGA 1700 Intel processors with DDR4 support, PCIe 5.0, and Thunderbolt connectivity.
